diagnosis.final_diagnosis: Left tentorial, cerebellar ICH and tracking into the brainstem.
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The diagnosis was made based on the patient's sudden onset of slurred speech, right arm numbness, and imaging studies (CT and MRI) which revealed a left cerebellar hemorrhage and multiple ischemic strokes. The lack of identified vascular malformations or other causes for the hemorrhage from imaging studies further supported this diagnosis.
